zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Katheryn Brooke於大約1500年出生在英國。她於大約1521年與Robert Brooke在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Katheryn Brooke于大约1500年出生在英国。她于大约1521年与Robert Brooke在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Katheryn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered spelling of Katherine , influenced by the productive name suffix -yn.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Katheryn Brooke was born about 1500, in England. She married Robert Brooke about 1521, in London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1566, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Katheryn Brookeは約1500年にイギリスで生まれた。約1521年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップでRobert Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップにて埋葬された。

ko.St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eas: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프
ko.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Katheryn Brooke(은)는 대략 1500년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1521년 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프에서 Robert Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Brooke aproximadamente 1521, em London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Katheryn Brooke родилась около 1500 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Brooke около 1521 г. в местности лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1566 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия.
